message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "Discounting" {
  [DiscountingBuilder]
  +getDiscountRate(): BigDecimal
  +getDiscountRateDayCountFraction(): DayCountFractionEnum
  +getDiscountRateDayCountFractionScheme(): String
  +getDiscountingType(): DiscountingTypeEnum
  +setDiscountRate(BigDecimal): Discounting.DiscountingBuilder
  +setDiscountRateDayCountFraction(DayCountFractionEnum): Discounting.DiscountingBuilder
  +setDiscountRateDayCountFractionScheme(String): Discounting.DiscountingBuilder
  +setDiscountingType(DiscountingTypeEnum): Discounting.DiscountingBuilder
  +build(): Discounting
}

@enduml
